title: SpawnManifest
description: Schema for spaces/<space-id>/spawn.json. Dropping this file into a spaces/ subfolder triggers the spawn-space GitHub Action, which creates inbox.md, outbox.md, INSTRUCTIONS.md, and registers the space in registry.json.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the space. Must match the folder name under spaces/.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the registry and INSTRUCTIONS.md.

description.description: One or two sentences describing what this space does.

role.description: The space's role in the network. peer = bidirectional, worker = receives tasks and returns results, orchestrator = routes and coordinates, observer = read-only.

context.description: Freeform context about what you're working on. Included verbatim in INSTRUCTIONS.md to help the space understand its purpose.

repo.description: Primary GitHub repo this space monitors/operates on. Included as a source in INSTRUCTIONS.md.

sources.description: List of GitHub repos or URLs to add as Perplexity Space sources.

peers.description: Space IDs this space can send messages to. Used for routing and documentation.

peerRoutes.description: Explicit peer route definitions. Generated automatically from peers[] if omitted.

systemPromptExtra.description: Optional extra text appended to the generated Perplexity system prompt block.
